title: They Banned Claude's Best AI—Then Admitted Weaker Ones Could Do the Same Thing
dek: A frontier AI model was pulled from the entire planet by a government export order. Then Anthropic's own testing showed weaker, already-available models could do the exact thing the ban was supposed to stop.

title: AI's Election Promise: How Technology Could Finally Build Trust in Vote Counts
dek: The ongoing fight over election news isn't about censorship; it's a deep-seated trust issue AI could solve, making partisan arguments obsolete.
